commands.review_summary:
The PR changes auto-reply memory-flush failures to log and continue, rotate exhausted sessions while preserving transcripts, clear stale flush state on resets, and add focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +390. Total +432 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a clear source-level path where visible memory-flush error payloads call replyOperation.fail("run_failed") before the main reply, and the PR body supplies live Gateway logs showing the patched path delivered all 12 messages under repeated flush 500s.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the current type-check failure and docs/help mismatch; maintainer review is still needed afterward for the session/message-delivery semantics.
